Package global.thalion.ttio.providers

package global.thalion.ttio.providers
Storage/transport provider abstraction — Milestone 39. The TTI-O data model and API are the standard; the storage backend is a pluggable implementation detail. Providers register via ServiceLoader (service interface: StorageProvider) and are resolved by URL scheme or explicit name. Two providers ship with v0.6:
  • Hdf5Provider — wraps the existing Hdf5File.
  • MemoryProvider — in-memory tree for tests and transient pipelines.

API status: Stable (Provisional per M39 — may change before v1.0).
